---
name: Suggest a spot
about: Add a pizzeria to openpizzamap.com
title: "[Spot] "
labels: suggestion
---

**Faster path:** use the form at https://openpizzamap.com/add-your-spot. It takes 30 seconds.

If you're here on purpose, fill this in:

**Google Maps URL:** (paste it)

**City, country:**

**Why is it worth eating at?** (one sentence — what makes the pizza)

**Style:** (Neapolitan / Roman / Sicilian / NY / Detroit / other)

**Have you eaten there?** (yes / no — if no, where's the recommendation from?)
